Environment - failure.title: Environment error
Environment - failure.userMessage: IIB detected a virtual/remote environment or interfering software.
causes: Remote desktop or screen-sharing software running

Process blocklist - failure.title: Failed to retrieve process blocklist
Process blocklist - failure.userMessage: IIB could not download its prohibited-process list from Inspera servers.
causes: Firewall or proxy blocking Inspera traffic
fixes: Check internet connection and click Retry in IIB
Try a different network or disable VPN

Connection quality - failure.title: Too poor connection quality
Connection quality - failure.userMessage: Network connection to Inspera is not stable enough.
fixes: Move closer to router or change network

Clock accuracy - failure.title: Clock accuracy error
Clock accuracy - failure.userMessage: System clock does not match global time.
causes: Manual time setting instead of automatic sync
fixes: Enable automatic time sync in Windows Settings

Number of screens - failure.title: Incorrect number of screens
Number of screens - failure.userMessage: Multiple displays detected during system check.
fixes: Reconnect monitor after checks pass (if allowed)

Power state - failure.title: No external power supply
Power state - failure.userMessage: Laptop is not plugged into a power outlet.
fixes: Plug in charger and click Retry

CPU features - failure.title: Unsupported CPU
CPU features - failure.userMessage: CPU does not support SSE4.2 instruction set required by IIB.
fixes: Use a different computer with a supported CPU

App version - failure.title: Obsolete app version
App version - failure.userMessage: Installed IIB version is no longer supported.
fixes: Download latest IIB from your institution
Uninstall old version before installing new one

App location - failure.title: Wrong application location
App location - failure.userMessage: IIB is not installed in the correct location (Mac: /Applications).
causes: Launched from Downloads instead of Applications folder
fixes: Complete installation and move app to Applications folder

After completion - failed.title: Login configuration error
After completion - failed.userMessage: Sign-in failed or wrong login method used.
causes: Wrong SSO or one-time-user option selected
fixes: Verify correct sign-in option with your institution

Device check failure.title: Device check failure
causes: Device does not meet institution requirements
fixes: Contact your exam provider for assistance

Incorrect keyboard language.title: Keyboard language error
causes: Keyboard language not on institution approved list
fixes: Switch to approved keyboard layout in Windows Settings
Contact institution for approved language list

desktop changed.title: Active desktop changed
desktop changed.userMessage: Windows virtual desktop or display configuration changed during exam.
fixes: Close all virtual desktops before exam
Do not switch desktops during exam

failed to close.title: Failed to close applications
failed to close.userMessage: IIB could not terminate prohibited applications.
fixes: Manually close listed apps in Task Manager
End process tree for stubborn processes

iceworm failure.title: System check component failed (iceworm)
iceworm failure.userMessage: IIB's iceworm component exited during system checks — often during the connection check.
causes: Network or firewall blocked the connectionCheck endpoint
Check was cancelled after a prior error
fixes: Check internet and allow cloudfront.net / Inspera traffic through firewall
Close GPU overlay and recording apps, restart IIB

system check aborted.title: System check cancelled
system check aborted.userMessage: IIB cancelled the system check before completion.
fixes: Review earlier errors in the log (Fyne/GLFW lines)
Restart IIB and do not interact during system checks

UI runtime error.title: UI runtime crash (Fyne/GLFW)
UI runtime error.userMessage: IIB's user interface hit a runtime error during system checks.
causes: Graphics driver or GPU overlay conflict
Known Fyne framework bug on some hardware
fixes: Disable overlays (Discord, Xbox Game Bar, AMD/NVIDIA)

Full disk access.title: Failed to acquire full disk access
Full disk access.userMessage: IIB does not have Full Disk Access permission (macOS).
causes: Full Disk Access not granted in System Settings
Permission toggle did not take effect
fixes: Enable Full Disk Access for Inspera Integrity Browser
Toggle permission off and on, then Retry in IIB
On Mac: tccutil reset All no.inspera.launcher if permissions stuck

Screen Capture.title: Screen capture apps detected
Screen Capture.userMessage: Other applications have screen recording permission.
causes: OBS, ShareX, or similar recording software
Screen recording enabled for other apps (Mac)
fixes: Disable screen recording permission for other apps

Failed to capture screen.title: Failed to capture screen
Failed to capture screen.userMessage: IIB cannot record the screen (proctored exams).
fixes: Grant screen recording permission to IIB

Cannot upload files.title: Cannot upload files
Cannot upload files.userMessage: File upload to Inspera servers failed.

Webcam.title: Webcam error
causes: Camera in use by another app
